What are swim nappies designed to do? Swim nappies are specifically designed to catch and contain poo, not urine. Just like other swimwear, swim nappies do not absorb liquids. They are designed to let water out for safety reasons, preventing babies from being weighed down in the water. What size do I need? Our swim nappies come up a little small so we recommend you go for a size up. You can view our size chart for the recommended measurements at the top of this page. How do you use them? Just pull on and prepare to plunge! When you head to the pool, a Revolutionary Reusable swim nappy is the only item your baby needs. No extra protection is required. How do you wash reusable swim nappies? After you're out of the water, rinse your swim nappy and store it for up to 3 days before washing. Pop them in your machine along with your reusable nappies and wash at 40°C. Finally, air dry or tumble dry on low. Are Bambino Mio swim nappies safe for babies? Yes! Unlike a normal nappy, they won't swell up and add weight in the water. They are also made from gentle, hygienic and stretchy fabrics for serious comfort (OEKO-TEX Standard 100).
